title.en: As soon as the machine spirit heard Ye Tian's w...

content.en:
As soon as the machine spirit heard Ye Tian's words, he knew what Ye Tian was going to do, so he reminded: "Master, those forbidden places are extremely dangerous, and some of them may even fall to the powerful supreme, and the master really can't go there." "

"You should know that I have a special doppelganger, so I don't have to go to the main body. "

Ye Tian said.

Saying this, the machine spirit was a little relieved, so he said: "Master, some forbidden lands are forbidden places for the invincible, but not for the supreme, so the possibility that those forbidden lands have eternal resources is not very high. As far as I know, there are these ...... in forbidden places that may have eternal resources."

The machine spirit said the names of each forbidden place, and at the same time also said the basic situation of each forbidden place.

What surprised Ye Tian a little was that the forbidden land of Longze was also among them.

But that's right, a forbidden place like Longze is very dangerous, even Jin Zu feels that such a forbidden place is extremely dangerous, and the powerful supreme does not dare to step into it easily, so it may indeed contain eternal resources.

Moreover, creatures such as dragon ferrets actually rely on bloodline, and they can become second-class invincible or even first-class invincible when they become adults, so they do not take the path of cultivation, and they do not need eternal resources to condense the eternal body.

Therefore, even if a creature like a dragon ferret sees eternal resources, it will not be too excited.

Therefore, there may be an ownerless eternal resource in Longze, and he is ready to enter Longze again to look for it.

this day.

Ye Tian went to the forbidden land of Longze, but instead of going to the main body, he let the replica body dragon weasel enter Longze.

The dragon weasel body he copied was only a second-class invincible, and his strength was indeed not strong, and it was difficult for him to exert a very strong strength, but it was definitely safe in the Longze forbidden land, so his strength was secondary.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Longze Forbidden Land and began to look for eternal resources in the Longze Forbidden Land, he was looking for it on the periphery of the Longze Forbidden Land at first, and did not enter the core area of the Longze Forbidden Land, after all, the core area was very dangerous.

Year after year passed, Ye Tian didn't know how long he had been searching, but he found a lot of valuable treasures, but he didn't see the shadow of the eternal resources.

"Gotta go to the core!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The place where the most likely place to give birth to eternal resources is the core area of the Longze Forbidden Land, and if you look for it on the periphery, you will find endless years and no gain.

So, Ye Tian headed towards the core area of the Longze Forbidden Land.

And at this time, he felt a terrifying aura of coercion, the other party's breath was definitely at the level of the supreme, but he didn't know the identity of the other party, what kind of creature it belonged to.

But soon, Ye Tian saw this powerful and mysterious creature.

Thundered!!!!!

In the core area, in the midst of endless thunder, a creature resembling a brontosaurus was sleeping there, and the aura on its body was extremely terrifying.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian couldn't recognize this creature, but the machine spirit should know it.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian called the machine spirit, conjured up the appearance of this creature, and asked the machine spirit: "Machine spirit, do you know what kind of creature this is?"

The machine spirit stared at the influence of this creature, and was suddenly shocked: "Master, this is the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon, one of the oldest creatures in the Source Sea, it was the Supreme Realm as soon as it was born, even if it does not cultivate, its strength will be extremely strong." They are eternal beings and are almost impossible to kill. Master, in the area near the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon, there will definitely be an eternal resource, that is, the Eternal Resource-Thunder Source Liquid! Moreover, it is very likely that there is more than one Thunder Source Liquid. "

"Thunder Source Ancient Dragon!"

Ye Tian could feel from the tone of the machine spirit how powerful this creature was, I was afraid that it was even more terrifying than a powerful supreme like Jin Zu, and it was definitely the overlord in the forbidden land of Longze.

Maybe the dragon weasel was too weak and belonged to the creatures in Longze, so Ye Tian approached here as a dragon ferret and did not let the Lei Yuan ancient dragon wake up.

Otherwise, the other party's breath will be enough to bombard him.

Ye Tian slowly searched for the Thunder Source Liquid in the area where the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon was, and because he was very careful, the speed of exploration was very slow.

After exploring for hundreds of years, Ye Tian found a copy of the Thunder Source Liquid here.

"This Thunder Source Liquid is in Thunder Ze, once you enter Thunder Ze, I'm afraid it will be detected by Thunder Source Ancient Dragon!" Ye Tian pondered.

He didn't take this thunder source liquid for the time being, but continued to look for the thunder source liquid.

Tens of thousands of years passed in a flash, and Ye Tian also found all this area.

In the end, he found three copies of the Thunder Source Liquid, two of which were not in the Thunder Ze where the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon lived, so he took all the two Thunder Source Liquids.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian slowly retreated, without causing any fluctuations, and gradually left Long Ze, returned to the outside world, and sent two copies of Thunder Source Liquid to Ye Tian's hands.

Then, Ye Tian continued to go to Longze as a dragon ferret, he was ready to take the risk of trying to collect that share of the thunder source liquid, if he failed, it would only be a loss to lose this copy body.

If he succeeds, he can get another copy of the Thunder Source Liquid, which means too much to him.

Razor edge.

Ye Tian stepped into it, and instantly arrived at the location where Lei Yuanye was, and he was about to grab Lei Yuanye with one hand, so as to leave here.

But at this moment, a voice exploded in Ye Tian's ears.

"Little guy, you're going to steal my Thunder Source Liquid, although this thing is useless to me, it belongs to me after all!"

This is the voice of the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian saw that the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon was completely attributed, and his eyes full of infinite thunder stared at him, but he couldn't see any anger.

"Ancestor!"

Ye Tian shouted very undisciplinedly.

After all, in terms of bloodline, the body of this dragon ferret does belong to the race derived from the breath of the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon, so there is no problem in calling the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon an Ancestor.

"Call me Ancestor at you, and Lei Yuanye will give it to you, but it won't help you much, at most it will help you refine your body. "Lei Yuan Ancient Dragon Dao.

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Immediately, Ye Tian left Lei Ze with Lei Yuan Liquid and returned to the outer area of Long Ze.

Just as he was approaching the outer area of Long Ze, Ye Tian suddenly rushed out of Long Ze at the fastest speed, and then was instantly brought back to the Void Source Hall by the main body.

And at this time, Lei Yuan Ancient Dragon also sensed it.

Rumble!!!

Lei Yuan Ancient Dragon rushed out from within Long Ze, but it was too late to catch Ye Tian.

"Damn thief!!!"

The Thunder Source Ancient Dragon roared angrily.

He could now see that his so-called junior was definitely instructed by a cultivator to come to him to steal the Thunder Source Liquid.

Although he didn't care about Lei Yuanye, he was deceived, which was the reason for his anger.

However, he didn't know that his so-called many blood juniors were also fake.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian looked at the third Thunder Source Liquid in his hand and smiled.
